title: thelymitra matthewsii
intro: Thelymitra matthewsii, also known as the Melbourne sun orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which contain alkaloids that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Thelymitra matthewsii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antibacterial agent. Thelymitra matthewsii is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or extract for use in herbal remedies.
